regbattle.setup_opt_master: Voice channel generator (squads are created from it)
regbattle.setup_opt_announce: Text channel for pings and announcements
regbattle.setup_opt_insquad_role: "In Squad" role (assigned on joining RB voice)
regbattle.setup_opt_played_min: Min. minutes in RB voice for role (default 15)
regbattle.setup_opt_played_reset: Role reset hour in MSK (0-23, default 23)
regbattle.addrole_description: Add a role to RB configuration
regbattle.removerole_description: Remove a role from RB configuration
regbattle.error_admin_only: This command is available to administrators only.
regbattle.error_setup_required_first:
Initial setup requires **all primary** parameters:
`/regbattle setup master:#voice category:#category announce:#text ping_role:@role insquad_role:@role`
regbattle.error_pb_not_configured: RB system is not configured. Use `/regbattle setup`.
regbattle.setup_next_steps:
Next steps:
• `/regbattle addrole type:commander` — field commander roles
• `/regbattle addrole type:mute` — mute-exempt roles
• Join the generator to create a squad
regbattle.panel_desc_orders:
📢 **ORDERS** — mutes all fighters for 30 sec.
The commander gives orders, everyone listens.
regbattle.panel_desc_kick:
👢 **KICK** — select a member to disconnect
from the squad voice channel.
regbattle.panel_desc_mute:
🔇 **MUTE** — select a member to
mute/unmute their microphone.
regbattle.panel_desc_dmping:
📩 **DM PING** — send a direct message
to all available fighters (5 min cooldown).
regbattle.panel_desc_aviation:
✈️ **AVIATION** — create an aviation channel (up to 4 people),
linked to this squad.
regbattle.panel_desc_transfer:
🔄 **TRANSFER COMMAND** — transfer squad
control to another fighter.
regbattle.panel_desc_reprimand:
⚠️ **REPRIMAND** — official disciplinary
action with type and reason selection.
regbattle.error_owner_only: Only the squad commander can use this button.
regbattle.orders_already_active: Orders are already active. Wait for them to finish.
regbattle.orders_active_embed_desc:
All fighters are muted for **{seconds} sec.**
The commander is giving orders. Listen carefully!
regbattle.orders_success: Orders active! Muted **{count}** fighters for 30 sec.
regbattle.kick_prompt: Select a fighter to disconnect from the voice channel:

regbattle.mute_prompt: Select a fighter to mute/unmute their microphone:
regbattle.mute_owner_only: Only the commander can mute fighters.
regbattle.mute_error: Failed to change mute state. Check bot permissions.
regbattle.dmping_cooldown: DM cooldown: **{seconds} sec.** Try again later.

regbattle.dmping_no_targets: No available fighters with the ping role.

regbattle.transfer_owner_only: Only the current commander can transfer command.
regbattle.transfer_left_channel: The fighter has already left the squad voice channel.
regbattle.transfer_notify: You have been appointed commander of **SQUAD {n}**! Use the control panel above.
regbattle.recruit_ping_needed: **{count}** more fighters needed. Join the voice channel!
regbattle.full_suggest_desc:
All squads are filled.

Reserve fighters — move to {channel} and stand by.
regbattle.squad_disbanded_desc: Voice channel is empty. Squad disbanded.

regbattle.reprimand_types_not_set: Reprimand types are not configured. Use `/regbattle addrole type:reprimand_type`.

regbattle.reprimand_user_not_found: User not found on the server.
regbattle.reprimand_no_bot: Cannot issue a reprimand to a bot.
regbattle.reprimand_modal_label: Specify the reason for the reprimand
regbattle.reprimand_owner_only_modal: Only the squad commander can issue reprimands.
regbattle.reprimand_offender_not_found: Offender not found on the server.
regbattle.appeal_offender_only: Only the offender can file an appeal.
regbattle.appeal_already_submitted: Appeal already submitted. Use the created channels.
regbattle.appeal_already_annulled: This reprimand has already been annulled.
regbattle.appeal_processing: Appeal is already being processed. Please wait.
regbattle.appeal_ping_message: {mentions} — an appeal has been filed for a reprimand.
regbattle.appeal_info_footer:
Discuss the situation in these channels.
Use the buttons below to make a decision.
regbattle.annul_no_rights: You do not have permission to annul reprimands.
regbattle.annul_self_forbidden: You cannot annul your own reprimand.
regbattle.annul_processing: Annulment is already being processed. Please wait.
regbattle.appeal_decision_already_resolved: Appeal has already been reviewed or the reprimand is not under review.
regbattle.appeal_decision_no_rights: You do not have permission to review appeals.
regbattle.appeal_decision_self_forbidden: You cannot review your own appeal.
regbattle.appeal_decision_processing: Decision is already being processed. Please wait.

welcome.greeting_desc:
Welcome, <@{userId}>! 👋

We're glad to see you on the **{server}** server!
Are you here to **join the regiment** or do you have **another question**?

> Please choose the appropriate option below 👇
welcome.chosen_desc:
Welcome, <@{userId}>! 👋

We're glad to see you on the **{server}** server!

> Selected: **{choice}** ✅
welcome.rules_prompt_desc:
Glad you made this choice, **candidate**! 🎖️

Before submitting a ticket to join the regiment, you need to read the **rules of our regiment**.

⚠️ **The "I have read the rules" button will become available after reading both documents.**
welcome.rules_prompt_all_read:
✨ **Excellent!** You have read both documents.
Click the **"I have read the rules"** button to continue!
welcome.server_rules_disclaimer: > *Ignorance of the rules does not exempt you from responsibility.*
welcome.server_rules_general_value:
👮‍♂️ **Administration** acts at its discretion and may make decisions beyond the written rules. Discussion is prohibited — appeal via tickets or DM.
🚫 **Ban evasion** — logging in from other accounts = **permanent ban** for all.
🛑 **Conflicts** — ignoring admin requests = block.
📝 **Updates** — rules may change without notice.
🕵️ **Spirit of the law** — exploiting loopholes is punished at admin discretion.
📣 **Witnesses** — see a violation? Open a ticket.
welcome.server_rules_comms_value:
Strictly prohibited:
• Violation of Discord ToS and Community Guidelines
• Any actions harmful to the server

🤬 **Insults and toxicity**
• Direct and indirect humiliation
• Discrimination (nationality, gender, age, language)
• Veiled insults, toxic trolling

🤐 **Forbidden topics**
❌ Politics and military conflicts
❌ Religion (if it leads to disputes)
❌ Extremism: fascism, nazism, terrorism
❌ Shock content: genocide, suicide, drugs
❌ Propaganda: racism, xenophobia
welcome.server_rules_spam_value:
• Repetitive messages, emojis, GIFs
• Voice flood (Soundpad, voice scramblers)
• Meaningless messages to farm levels
• Advertising in DMs and links without permission
• RMT, selling accounts/cheats

✅ *Exceptions: content approved by the administration.*
welcome.server_rules_zero_value:
• NSFW / 18+ content
• Doxxing (publishing personal data)
• Leaking confidential information
• Slander and provocations
welcome.server_rules_bots_value:
• Spam, crashes, and malicious activity are prohibited
• Abuse of commands is punishable
welcome.server_rules_profile_value:
**Nickname and status:**
• Profanity, insults, dictator names are prohibited
• Impersonation of administration is prohibited
• No advertising or politics in status

**Avatar:**
• No NSFW, nazi symbols, provocations
welcome.server_rules_note_value:
Administration reserves the right to:
• Punish for actions not described in the rules
• Determine the severity of a violation by context
• Prevent attempts to circumvent the rules

*Rules are created to maintain order. Your politeness is the key to a comfortable atmosphere for all members of **EREZ**.*
welcome.regiment_rules_quote:
> *"Being an officer is not a status, it is a responsibility.
> But the respect is equally significant."*
welcome.regiment_rules_duties_value:
📉 **Minimum activity**
At least **1300 points** of regiment activity per season.
> *The requirement is easily achieved in 1–2 weeks with a season lasting 2 months.*

⚖️ **Rule compliance**
• Discord: Strict adherence to EREZ server rules
• Regiment battles: Compliance with the internal code of conduct in battles

👻 **No "Invisible" mode**
During combat prime-time (**17:00–21:00 MSK**) it is forbidden to be in Invisible / Offline status if you are available.

❗️ Violations may lead to **expulsion from the regiment**.
welcome.regiment_rules_rewards_value:
Command values each member's contribution. For activity and discipline:
⭐ Unique roles and chevrons
🔥 Priority for participation in battles and events
📈 Career advancement opportunity up to **Officer**
welcome.regiment_rules_officers_value:
• **Activity:** at least **1500 points** per season
• **Example:** impeccable behaviour
• **Participation:** attendance at meetings
• **Mentoring:** helping newcomers
welcome.join_complete_desc:
✅ **Excellent!** You have read the regiment rules.

🎖️ You have been assigned the **candidate** role — the ticket channel is now **open for you**!

Go to <#{ticketChannel}> and select the join ticket — the first available **recruiter** will respond.

We look forward to having you in our ranks! 🫡
welcome.other_question_desc:
Got it! Our ticket channel can help with your question.

Go to <#{ticketChannel}> and select the appropriate ticket — you will definitely get a response! 📬
welcome.ticket_ping_recruit_desc:
🎖️ <@{userId}>, **welcome, candidate!**

You have read the regiment rules.
✅ Candidate role assigned — this channel is now available to you.

Select the **join the regiment** ticket below — the first available recruiter will respond.
welcome.ticket_ping_other_desc:
👋 <@{userId}>, **welcome!**

Select the appropriate ticket below — and you will be helped with your question.
welcome.reminder_desc:
<@{userId}>, we noticed you haven't chosen a role on the server yet.

Please choose the appropriate option below 👇
welcome.error_not_for_you: ⛔ This button is not for you.
welcome.error_rate_limit: ⏳ Please wait a moment before the next click.
welcome.error_generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
welcome.error_no_ticket_channel: ⚠️ Ticket channel is not configured. Contact the administration.
welcome.error_role_failed: ⚠️ Failed to assign the candidate role. Please try again or contact the administration.
welcome.error_admin_only: This command is available to administrators only.
welcome.error_no_params:
Specify at least one parameter to configure.
Example: `/welcome setup auto_role:@Newcomer welcome_channel:#welcome`

To reset, use `/welcome reset`.
welcome.error_role_hierarchy: {label}: role **{role}** is above the bot's role in the hierarchy. Move it lower.
welcome.cmd_setup_description: Configure / change welcome roles and channels
welcome.opt_auto_role: Role assigned to every new member on join
welcome.opt_member_role: Member role (when received — auto-role is removed)
welcome.config_footer: Use /welcome setup to change • /welcome reset to reset

panel.access_description:
Use the buttons below to manage
user access to the channel.
panel.settings_hint:
**Boosters** get access to renaming, limit, and bitrate.
**🏆 Reward role** (for voice activity) also grants region change. Use `/voice stats` to check your progress.

delete.author: 🗑️ Delete Channel
delete.confirm_text:
**Are you sure?**

The channel and all its settings will be **permanently deleted**.
This action cannot be undone.

reward.author: 🏆 Activity Reward!
reward.description:
Congratulations **{displayName}**! 🎉

After spending **{totalHours} hours** in voice channels, {userMention} earned the role {roleMention}!

> 🎙️ Extended temp-channel features are now available:
> ✏️ Rename · 🔢 Limit · 🎚️ Bitrate · 🌐 Region

Chat more — earn more!

vacation.panel_intro: Here you can officially notify about your temporary absence from the clan or return early.
vacation.panel_step1: Click **"Go on vacation"** and choose a reason
vacation.panel_step3: The request will be sent to command for review
vacation.panel_step4: Once approved, your roles are temporarily removed
vacation.panel_step5: When it ends, roles are restored automatically
vacation.panel_auto_deny_note: ⏰ Unreviewed requests are automatically denied after **3 hours**.
vacation.panel_reminder_note: 🔔 You'll receive a DM reminder **24 hours** before your vacation ends.
vacation.expired_text: The request was not reviewed within 3 hours.
vacation.dm_approved_title: ✅ Your vacation request has been approved!
vacation.dm_approved_roles_note: Your roles have been temporarily removed and will be restored upon return.
vacation.dm_approved_return_hint: To return early, click **"Return from vacation"** on the panel.
vacation.dm_denied_title: ❌ Your vacation request has been denied
vacation.dm_expired_text: Your request was not reviewed within 3 hours and was automatically denied.
vacation.dm_expired_resubmit: You can submit a new request.
vacation.dm_reminder_roles_note: Your roles will be restored automatically when it ends.
vacation.dm_reminder_extend_hint: If you need to extend — contact command.
vacation.error_not_configured: The vacation system is not configured.
vacation.error_already_on_vacation:
You are already on vacation until **{date}** ({duration} remaining)

Use **"Return from vacation"** to return early.
vacation.error_pending_exists: You already have a pending request. Wait for a decision or it will auto-expire in 3 hours.
vacation.error_pending_exists_short: You already have a pending request.
vacation.error_primetime:
Cannot go on vacation during prime time or {buffer}h before it.
Blocked: **{primeText}**
vacation.error_primetime_short: It's prime time now. Vacation unavailable.
vacation.error_primetime_quick:
Cannot take leave during prime time.
Blocked: **{primeText}**
vacation.error_cooldown:
A minimum of **{cooldownDays} days** must pass after returning from vacation.
Cooldown expires in **{leftDays} days.**
vacation.error_cooldown_short: Post-vacation cooldown has not expired yet.
vacation.error_cooldown_quick:
Vacation cooldown: **{leftDays} days** remaining.
Minimum break between vacations: **{cooldownDays} days.**
vacation.error_month_limit:
You've reached the vacation limit: **{max}** in the last 30 days.
You already had **{count}** vacations in this period.
vacation.error_quick_week_limit:
You've reached the quick leave limit: **{max}** per 7 days.
Used: **{used}/{max}**
vacation.error_already_processing: Request is already being processed. Please wait.
vacation.error_already_reviewed: This request has already been reviewed.
vacation.error_no_review_perms: You don't have permission to review requests.
vacation.error_self_approve: You cannot approve your own request.
vacation.error_review_in_progress: Request is already being processed by another reviewer.
vacation.error_member_left: Member left the server. Request denied.
vacation.error_already_active_target: {member} already has an active vacation. Request automatically denied.
vacation.success_returned: Welcome back! Your roles have been restored.
vacation.success_quick:
Quick leave set for **{hours} hours**.
You'll return automatically on **{date}**.

Click **"Return from vacation"** for early return.
vacation.success_approved: Request by {tag} **approved**. Roles removed, vacation started.

setup.description: Set up / modify the vacation system

panel.description: Deploy the vacation panel in a channel

primetime.opt_buffer: Block N hours before prime time

antiabuse.opt_max_per_month: Max vacations per 30 days (0 = no limit)
antiabuse.opt_max_quick_per_week: Max quick leaves per 7 days (0 = no limit)

vacation.error_admin_only: This command is only available to administrators.
vacation.error_setup_required_full:
Initial setup requires **all** parameters:
`/vacation setup review:#channel log:#channel role:@role`
vacation.error_review_equals_panel:
The review channel (**review**) cannot be the same as the panel channel.
Panel is currently in <#{channelId}>. Specify a different channel.
vacation.success_setup_next_steps:
Next steps:
• `/vacation addrole type:remove` — roles to remove
• `/vacation addrole type:reviewer` — reviewers
• `/vacation addrole type:ping` — roles to ping
• `/vacation panel` — deploy the panel
vacation.error_panel_in_review:
Panel cannot be placed in the review channel.
Review channel: <#{channelId}>. Specify a different channel.
vacation.error_force_max_duration:
Maximum duration even for forced vacation is **{days} days**.
You specified: **{duration}**.
_(If you meant minutes — use `min`: `30min`)_
vacation.error_member_not_found: Member not found on the server.
vacation.success_force_return: {user} forcefully returned from vacation. Roles restored.
vacation.error_primetime_same:
Prime time start and end cannot be the same.
This would create a 24/7 vacation block.
vacation.success_primetime:
⏰ **Prime time updated:**

> 🕐 **Prime time:** {start}:00 — {end}:00 MSK
> 🚫 **Blocked from:** {blockStart}:00 MSK (buffer {buffer}h)
vacation.error_not_configured_setup: The vacation system is not configured. Use `/vacation setup`.
vacation.antiabuse_hint:
Specify parameters to change:
`/vacation antiabuse cooldown:7 max_per_month:3 max_quick_per_week:2`
